schema_notes: LLM-seeded stub; populated by regen_v3 from primary-source APIs.

person.wealth_source: Ken Langone co-founded Home Depot in 1978 and served as chairman; his net worth is primarily concentrated in Home Depot stock and real estate holdings.

net_worth.range_note: Forbes RTB seed; range is ±15% to acknowledge stock-price volatility.
net_worth.liquidity_notes: Significant Home Depot stock holdings (illiquid concentration risk) offset by diversified real estate and some liquid securities.

detected_vehicles.foundations_note: Primary giving vehicle appears to be the Langone Medical Research Foundation; no major philanthropic LLC identified.

rollup.expected_5pct_tenure_method: 5% × net_worth_best × liquidity_pct × years_as_billionaire (uncapped tenure); computed by aggregate_v3.py
